_comment: Sprint E1.6 baseline (2026-05-12, #1716): Plan 06.09's deletion of bridge.remote_kill_switch is finished by dropping the reflexive set_remote_kill_switch WiringEntry; total drops 36 → 35. Prior context: Sprints 04.09/04.10/04.11 added the CommandHandler.set_app setter (direct _wire() call, not in the manifest) and bumped 35 → 36. Sprints 01.02–01.05 own the rest of the manifest.
_subsequence_note: set_daily_log appears twice — first as a CommandHandler setter (Sprint 01.03), then as a reflexive BridgeApp setter (Sprint 01.04). Both have the same setter_name but different target objects. The structural-parity subsequence test traverses by name only, so the two entries appear consecutively in expected order.

sprint_01_03_pending_entries._comment: Five wire-to-None entries on CommandHandler. target=app._commands, group=command-handler.
sprint_01_03_pending_entries.set_tick_manager: Deferred; revive if proactive mode activated (Sprint 09.13)
sprint_01_03_pending_entries.set_daily_log: Plan 02 owns construction via BridgeApp.set_daily_log then mirrors here (Sprint 09.14)

sprint_01_04_reflexive_pending_entries._comment: Reflexive wire-to-None entries on BridgeApp itself. target=app (the BridgeApp instance), group=bridge-app. The setters mutate self._X. set_workorder_store / set_workorder_stream are deliberately NOT in the manifest — only the attributes are declared as None — because Plan 03 hasn't decided the construction shape yet. E1.6 (#1716) retired set_remote_kill_switch alongside Plan 06.09's RemoteKillSwitch class deletion.
sprint_01_04_reflexive_pending_entries.set_memory_file: Plan 05 owns MemoryFile construction (renamed from MemoryIndex in Sprint 05.06)
